visual_description: A man in a black leather jacket stands near a doorway marked with a red diamond, while a woman in a shiny silver jacket enters smiling and gestures with open hands. She claps and then shakes hands with an older man in a grey suit, while several other men stand nearby with their hands pressed together in a respectful posture.
audio_description: Clapping and spoken greetings are audible as the woman greets the older man.
